name: Toy Baked Goods Food Set - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Get your kiddo involved in the festivities with this Toy Baked Goods Food Set from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This toy baked goods set includes a dessert basket with wooden muffins, croissants, cinnamon rolls and biscotti to keep your kiddo engaged with fun role play, especially when combined with other Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia wooden toy sets. As cute as they are fun to play with, these wooden baked goods also make a great kitchen decoration.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
